name: wyvern-ai-rules
description: Install and manage Wyvern AI agent project rules under .cursor/rules/ai-rules (Cursor) with optional Cline sync to .clinerules/ai-rules/.

commands.title: AI Rules: Install / update rules in workspace
AI Rules: Enable all rules (global mirror)
AI Rules: Disable all rules (global mirror)
AI Rules: Copy global mirror into workspace
AI Rules: Sync bundled rules to Cline (.clinerules/ai-rules)
AI Rules: Enable or disable a single rule…
AI Rules: Reset workspace rules folder to defaults…

aiRules.promptInstallOnUpdate.description: When the extension version changes, offer to refresh workspace rules from the bundled copy.

aiRules.autoSyncClineWhenInstalled.description: When Cline is installed, automatically mirror bundled .mdc rules into .clinerules/ai-rules/ after install / reset / copy-from-global (and when Cline is first detected).

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync-bundled && npm run compile
